title: Uruguayan Grilled Skillet Steak with Smoky Beet Sauce
description: A classic Uruguayan dish featuring a grilled steak served with a smoky beet sauce, perfect for a hearty dinner.

ingredients.name: steak
ingredients.notes: ribeye or strip loin work well

instructions: Season steak with salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
Grill steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 130°F for medium-rare.
Let steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add chopped beets and cook for 5-7 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add balsamic vinegar and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve steak with smoky beet sauce spooned over the top.
